ProductConstraintModel.description: Constraint model for the Telco Platinum SLA add-on. Enforces: SLA upgrade cannot be sold without both a Router and a Data Plan on the same quote (CML_REQUIRED_COMPONENT_MISSING error surfaced by ConfigureTelcoBundle Invocable Action). Only one SLA tier may be active per site — Platinum is mutually exclusive with any other SLA tier. Triggers 15% PoT pricing premium via Procedure 3 (see ADR-004). See ADR-006.

constraint.description: Platinum SLA requires a Router — SLA guarantee is meaningless without the managed hardware.
Platinum SLA requires an active Data Plan — SLA covers the connectivity service, not hardware alone.
Maximum 1 SLA tier per site — Platinum is mutually exclusive with other SLA products.
constraint.masterLabel: Platinum SLA Max One Per Site
